race.comment: STREET LEGAL (5) has been well supported in both runs back and has produced strong efforts without saluting. At his top now and draws the A1. Won't get many better chances. SCOOPED (4) looks the main danger and should also be hitting his straps third-up off two good runs. Blinkers going on could prove decisive. GRAND MILLESIME (10) has been slightly disappointing in her first two starts for the Clarken camp but remains in the mix third-up. If she can recapture her Victorian form she can play a major role. SENSATIONAL SECRET (8) returns for the R & C Jolly camp and has peaks that can give this a shake. Hard to make a serious case off no public trial though. TORPEDOES (7) has mixed his form dramatically since resuming but holds claims on best.
